channel.title: Mountain on Cédric Walter blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mountain on Cédric Walter blog

item.title: The perfect equipment for via ferrata
item.description: Via ferrata is a mountain activity that involves climbing routes equipped with fixed cables, ladders, bridges, and other aids to assist climbers along exposed and challenging terrain. Proper equipment is essential to ensure safety and comfort during via ferrata climbing.
